$comment: EXAMPLE surface inventory for state-invariants.spec.js. Copy to the project repo, fill with live-verified selectors, and point STATE_INVARIANTS_CONFIG at it. Each surface runs the 4-step invariant: establish -> navigate away -> back -> assert. Only MUST-persist surfaces (blocking:true) fail the build when state is lost; ephemeral surfaces (blocking:false) assert the opposite (state resets).

surfaces.note: Example: a GET-param filter that must survive navigation. Replace selectors with live-verified ones.
Ephemeral: nav must NOT reopen after navigation. blocking:false.

$actions: establish/navigateAway steps: click | clickFirst | fill(value) | select(value|__FIRST_NON_EMPTY__) | goto(url)
